# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: app-backups-bucket
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
  properties:
    name: $($.env.projectId)-app-backups-bucket # Bucket name must be globally unique. Appending project ID for uniqueness.
    project: $($.env.projectId)
    location: US-CENTRAL1 # Specify your desired region, e.g., US-EAST1, EUROPE-WEST1
    storageClass: STANDARD # Default storage class
    uniformBucketLevelAccess: true # Recommended for simpler IAM management and security
